title: Dispute Avoidance in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger dispute avoidance in practice judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Dispute Avoidance in Practice is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Dispute Avoidance in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good dispute avoidance in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Dispute Avoidance in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
